title: WhatsApp Groups
description: Configure your moderation rules: link protection, daily welcome, and progressive warnings.
hero_title: Turn on real moderation, group by group.
hero_text: Choose a group, enable anti-links, banned words, auto-exclusion, and a welcome message. Pro options stay separate to avoid confusion.
rule_antilinks_text: Automatically removes messages containing suspicious or off-topic links.
rule_welcome_text: Sends an automatic welcome message once a day.
rule_warnings_text: Warns members before any sanction for progressive moderation.
info_banner: Whappi applies rules only in groups where the session is an admin.
empty_no_sessions_text: Create a WhatsApp session before configuring your groups.
empty_no_connection_text: Connect a session to load groups and apply rules.
empty_no_groups_text: Add the session to a WhatsApp group, give it admin role, then come back here.
quota_line: {{used}}/{{limit}} active moderated group(s) on your {{plan}} plan.
quota_line_full: Upgrade to protect a new group.
quota_line_remaining: You have {{remaining}} group(s) left to activate.
group_locked_message: This group is not protected yet. Your {{plan}} plan already covers {{limit}} group(s). Upgrade to protect a new one.
essential_rules_desc: The useful minimum for Whappi to truly moderate this group.
presets_desc: Choose a template suited to your community. You can customize each setting afterwards.
presets_locked_text: Presets are reserved for Pro IA and Business. Starter stays intentionally simple: links, banned words, manual welcome, and auto-exclusion.
preset_professionnel_forbidden: scam, spam, gambling, crypto quick, telegram link
preset_professionnel_warning: @{{name}} message removed: {{reason}}. {{remaining}} warning(s) remaining before removal.
preset_education_welcome: Welcome new learners. Check the guidelines, stay on topic, and keep questions clear.
preset_education_warning: @{{name}} message removed: {{reason}}. {{remaining}} warning(s) remaining before removal.
preset_tontine_warning: @{{name}} message removed: {{reason}}. {{remaining}} warning(s) remaining before removal.
preset_suivi_client_forbidden: scam, spam, insults, off-topic, competitor link
preset_suivi_client_welcome: Welcome new customers arriving today. Please include your order number, need, and expected deadline.
preset_suivi_client_warning: @{{name}} message removed: {{reason}}. {{remaining}} warning(s) before removal from this customer care group.
scheduled_message_desc: Schedule an announcement, payment reminder, or recurring message.
scheduled_message_placeholder: e.g. Reminder: please confirm your attendance before 6pm.
pro_automation_desc: Scheduled messages are available with Pro IA and Business. Starter stays focused on simple moderation.
scheduled_legacy_locked: These old messages remain visible, but creating new scheduled messages requires Pro IA or Business.
warned_members_empty: No warned members in this group.
calendar_empty: No scheduled messages for this group.
rule_forbidden_text: Blacklist: messages containing these words or phrases will be removed.
rule_welcome_switch_text: Send an automated welcome message once a day.
manual_welcome_hint: You write this message manually. Whappi uses it as the group's welcome message.
rule_warning_switch_text: Remove the message and notify the member with a warning counter.
rule_exclusion_desc: Maximum number of warnings allowed before automatic removal from the group.
default_welcome_message: Welcome new members arriving today. Please stay on topic, avoid off-topic links, and keep exchanges constructive.
default_warning_message: @{{name}} your message was removed: {{reason}}. Please follow the group rules.
toast_presets_pro_required: Moderation presets are available with Pro IA or Business. Your current plan: {{plan}}.
toast_scheduled_pro_required: Scheduled messages are available with Pro IA or Business. Your current plan: {{plan}}.
toast_group_limit_reached: Limit reached: your {{plan}} plan covers {{limit}} moderated group(s).
toast_daily_welcome_error: Unable to schedule the daily message
toast_message_delete_error: Unable to delete this scheduled message
